title: viola × zahnii
intro: Viola × zahnii, also known as Zahn's pansy or hybrid pansy, is a cross between Viola tricolor and Viola arvensis, a type of flowering plant in the violet family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Viola × zahnii include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Viola × zahnii can be prepared as a herbal infusion, tincture, or salve, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
